title: Kojiki: The Death of Yamato Takeru
description: The tragic death of Japan's greatest hero — fatally wounded, he transforms into a white bird and flies toward heaven.
introduction: The tragic death of Japan's greatest hero — fatally wounded, he transforms into a white bird and flies toward heaven.

translation.original_text: 倭は国のまほろば たたなづく 青垣 山隠れる 倭しうるはし
translation.text: Yamato, the finest of lands — green fences of hills, mountain-hidden Yamato, how beautiful.
